name: The Gralloch
descriptionSeed: The dangerous face of the Churn — where the disorder rides VIOLENCE and something older and colder underneath it. A broken badland of feuding bands and worse things drawn to the lawlessness. Not every chaos-neighbor is generative Tumbledown or strange Spindrift; this one bites. The randomness of the axis-map put teeth here, and the wise cross it fast or not at all.
encounterFlavor: Raw lawless danger — a band demanding tribute, a settlement that survives by being meaner than the badland, a thing the feuds woke that neither side will name, a mercy that gets someone killed.
questSeeds: Two bands are feuding over a well and a third thing neither will name is picking off both; ending the feud means facing what the violence is feeding
A settlement of people who fled here to be free is being extorted; they'd rather die than go back under a city, and they might
Something in the Gralloch's heart isn't a person and isn't quite a beast — the demonic_angelic thread here is faint but real, and it's getting stronger where blood spills
